title: STRUCWOOD DIY Book Nook Kit - 3D Wooden Puzzles Book Nook for Adults - DIY Dollhouse Kit Bookshelf Decor with Dust Cover - Magic Book Nook for Teens Gift SQ-05The Lord The Ring
features: 【Inspiration】This stunning magic book nook is inspired by The Lord of the Rings. The Dark Lord Sauron appeared in Erejan as the "Talented Grandmaster" Anata. Lord Eregion, Celebripon, was deceived by Sauron and forged nineteen Lord of the Rings. Sauron secretly forged the One Ring to control other ruling rings. The interior of the book nook showed his arrival, with a huge magic dragon flying in the air, and the surrounding wizards seemed to sense his malice. The details are very realistic and exquisite, reproducing and processing the plot in the original work.

【Interesting Production Experience】 This is a nearly perfect craft kit, it is not a finished product, you need to assemble yourself, rest assured that we will include the instruction manual, even if you are a beginner, the instruction manual can guide you through the assembly. This product is suitable for teenagers over the age of 14 to complete alone, of course, you can also complete with family and friends, to increase the communication between adults and teenagers.

【Excellent Material】 Made from high-quality wood, this book nook kit is unbreakable, robust and long-lasting. The corner of the book contains a variety of elements, and the cabin contains rich scenes to satisfy people's fantasies of the library.

【The Perfect Gift】 This is a creative and wonderful gift, wrapped in a beautiful gift box that is more refined than the average craft. In your spare time, splicing a book nook kit independently will definitely make you feel happy. Giving it as a gift to family and friends is a great decision.

【WARM REMINDER】 The diy book nook kit has been 100% carefully checked before delivery to ensure that the accessories are complete and not missing. If you have any questions during assembly, please feel free to contact us, we will solve any problems as soon as possible. Note: You need to prepare the silicone liquid glue and three batteries (type AAA) by yourself, because transportation by air is prohibited.
